name: zinit
postCreateCommand: dir=${containerWorkspaceFolder}; home=${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zinit; mkdir -p $home && rm -rf $home/zinit.git && ln -s $dir $home/zinit.git && cp $dir/.devcontainer/zshrc $HOME/.zshrc; chgrp -R 1000 $dir 2>/dev/null || true; chmod g-w,o-w $dir 2>/dev/null || true
